title: 12 Angry Men
description: A jury holdout attempts to prevent a miscarriage of justice by forcing his colleagues to reconsider the evidence.

title: 3 Idiots
description: Two friends are searching for their long-lost companion. They revisit their college days and recall the memories of their friend who inspired them to think differently.
King Leonidas of Sparta and a force of 300 men fight the Persians at Thermopylae in 480 B.C.

title: A Silent Voice
description: A young man is mutually ostracized by his classmates after he bullies a deaf girl to the point where she moves away.

title: Barfi!
description: Three young people learn that love can neither be defined nor contained by society's definition of normal and abnormal.

title: Batman Begins
description: After training with his mentor, Batman begins his fight to free crime-ridden Gotham City from corruption.

title: Bhoot Police
description: Two brothers whose job is to hunt down and eradicate exo-spirits find themselves caught in a very unusual case in a remote village.

title: Deadpool
description: A wisecracking mercenary gets experimented on and becomes immortal, yet ugly, and sets out to track down the man who ruined his looks.

title: Doraemon: Nobita's Space Heroes
description: Nobita and his friends use gadgets from Doraemon to film a space hero movie, which turns into a real cosmic rescue mission.

title: Fifty Shades of Grey
description: Literature student Anastasia Steele's life changes forever when she meets the handsome, yet tormented, billionaire Christian Grey.

title: Fight Club
description: An insomniac office worker and a devil-may-care soap maker form an underground fight club that evolves into much more.

title: Forrest Gump
description: The history of the United States from the 1950s to the '70s unfolds from the perspective of an Alabama man with an IQ of 75.

title: From Up on Poppy Hill
description: A group of Yokohama teens look to save their school's clubhouse from the wrecking ball in preparations for the 1964 Tokyo Olympics.

title: Gone Girl
description: With his wife's disappearance having become the focus of an intense media circus, a man sees the spotlight turned on him when it's suspected that he may not be innocent.

title: Groundhog Day
description: A narcissistic, self-centered weatherman finds himself inexplicably living the same day over and over again.

title: The Hangover
description: Three buddies wake up from a bachelor party in Las Vegas with no memory of the previous night and the bachelor missing.

title: Housefull 3
description: A father doesn't want his three daughters to get married. Now, three men must convince the father that they are a perfect fit.

title: I Want to Eat Your Pancreas
poster: I Want to eat your pancreas.jpg
description: An aloof boy stumbles upon a secret journal of a popular classmate and learns that she is dying from a pancreatic illness.

title: Inception
description: A thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a C.E.O.

title: Interstellar
description: When Earth becomes uninhabitable, a team of explorers travels through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

title: John Wick
description: An ex-hitman comes out of retirement to track down the gangsters that took everything from him.

title: John Wick: Chapter 2
description: After returning to the criminal underworld to repay a debt, John Wick discovers that a large bounty has been put on his life.

title: Kabir Singh
description: A short-tempered house surgeon goes down a self-destructive path after the love of his life is forced to marry someone else.

title: Kal Ho Naa Ho
description: Naina's life is bleak until she meets Aman. But Aman has a secret that prevents him from reciprocating her love.

title: Mission: Impossible
description: An American secret agent, false accused of disloyalty, must break into a highly secured government command to clear his name.

title: The Dark Knight
description: When the menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc and chaos on the people of Gotham, Batman must accept one of the greatest psychological and physical tests.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
description: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in search for her homeland with the aid of a group of female prisoners and a drifter named Max.

title: Mad Max
description: In a self-destructing world, a vengeful Australian policeman sets out to stop a violent motorcycle gang.

title: Doraemon: Nobita's New Dinosaur
description: Nobita accidentally finds a fossilized dinosaur egg and hatches two new species of dinosaurs, initiating a grand time-travel adventure.

title: Ponyo
description: A five-year-old boy develops a relationship with Ponyo, a young goldfish princess who longs to become a human girl.

title: Sanam Teri Kasam
description: A musical tragic love story of an outcast girl Saraswati and an ex-convict Inder.

title: Se7en
description: Two detectives, a rookie and a veteran, hunt a serial killer who uses the seven deadly sins as his motives.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
description: Over the course of several years, two convicts form a friendship, seeking consolation and, eventually, redemption through basic compassion.

title: Stand by Me Doraemon
description: A cat-shaped robot from the 22nd century travels back in time to guide a miserable young boy onto the path of happiness.

title: Stand by Me Doraemon 2
description: Nobita travels back to the past to see his beloved grandmother, leading to an emotional journey about family bonds and future responsibilities.

title: Step Brothers
description: Two middle-aged, spoiled deeply immature men still living with their parents are forced to become roommates when their parents marry.

title: Shutter Island
description: A U.S. Marshal encounters terrifying truths when he investigates the disappearance of a murderer who escaped from a hospital for the criminally insane.

title: Superbad
description: Two co-dependent high school seniors are forced to deal with separation anxiety after their plan to stage a booze-fueled party goes awry.

title: Suzume
description: A modern action-adventure road movie where a 17-year-old girl named Suzume helps a mysterious young man close doors causing disasters across Japan.

title: Tekkonkinkreet
description: In Treasure Town, two street orphans, Black and White, wage war against yakuza forces trying to take over their city.

title: The Matrix
description: When a beautiful stranger leads computer hacker Neo to a forbidding underworld, he discovers the shocking truth--the life he knows is the elaborate deception of a malevolent cyber-intelligence.

title: The Pursuit of Happyness
description: A struggling salesman takes custody of his son as he's poised to begin a life-changing professional career.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
description: A young F.B.I. cadet must receive the help of an incarcerated and manipulative cannibal killer to catch another serial killer.

title: The Martian
description: An astronaut becomes stranded on Mars after his team assumes him dead, and must rely on his ingenuity to find a way to signal to Earth that he is alive.

title: Theri
description: When his daughter's life is threatened by a local gangster, an honest former cop must step up to protect her and settle an old score.

title: Your Name.
description: Two strangers find themselves linked in a bizarre way. When a connection forms, will distance be the only thing to keep them apart?

title: Aashiqui 2
description: Rahul loses his fans and fame due to alcoholism. However, he decides to turn a small-time singer into a rising star.

title: Animal
description: A violent father-son crime drama about a son's obsessive love for his father.

title: Arrival
description: A linguist works with the military to communicate with alien spacecrafts that have landed around the world.

title: Avengers: Endgame
description: After the devastating events of Infinity War, the universe is in ruins. With the help of remaining allies, the Avengers assemble once more.

title: Batman Begins
description: After training with his mentor, Batman begins his fight to free crime-ridden Gotham City from corruption.

title: Bhool Bhulaiyaa
description: An eccentric psychiatrist comes to solve a psychological mystery inside a haunted mansion.

title: Captain America: Civil War
description: Political involvement in the Avengers' affairs causes a rift between Captain America and Iron Man.

title: Casino Royale
description: James Bond goes on his first mission as a 00 agent, targeting a private banker to terrorists in a high-stakes poker game.

title: Die Hard
description: An N.Y.P.D. officer tries to save his leading wife and several others taken hostage by German terrorists during a Christmas party.

title: Dumb and Dumber
description: After a woman leaves a briefcase at the airport terminal, two well-meaning but incredibly stupid friends cross the country to return it.

title: Elysium
description: In the year 2154, the very wealthy live on a man-made space station while the rest of the population resides on a ruined Earth.

title: Ex Machina
description: A programmer at a huge internet-search giant is chosen to participate in a ground-breaking experiment in synthetic intelligence.

title: Extraction
description: Tyler Rake, a fearless black market mercenary, embarks on the most deadly extraction of his career.

title: The Fast and the Furious
description: Los Angeles police officer Brian O'Conner must decide where his loyalty really lies when he infiltrates a street racing gang.

title: Gladiator
description: A former Roman General sets out to exact vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family and sent him into slavery.

title: Golmaal: Fun Unlimited
description: Four runaway friends con a blind couple into letting them stay in their house, leading to hilarious complications.

title: Hera Pheri
description: Three unemployed men look for answers to all their financial problems, but an accidental wrong number completely changes their plans.

title: Hereditary
description: A grieving family is haunted by tragic and disturbing occurrences after the death of their secretive grandmother.

title: Housefull
description: A jinxed man believes he can find true love, but his bad luck leads to massive lies and chaotic misunderstandings.

title: I Am Legend
description: Years after a plague kills most of humanity and transforms the rest into monsters, the sole survivor in New York City struggles to find a cure.

title: Jawan
description: A high-octane action thriller which outlines the emotional journey of a man who is set to rectify the wrongs in the society.

title: Johnny English
description: After a sudden attack on MI7, Johnny English, Britain's most confident yet unintelligent spy, becomes Britain's only hope.

title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
description: Four teenagers are sucked into a magical video game, and the only way they can escape is to work together to finish the game.

title: Krrish
description: Krishna is forced by circumstances to use his superpowers and become the masked superhero Krrish to save his father.

title: Looper
description: In 2074, when the mob wants to get rid of someone, the target is sent into the past, where a hired gun makes the hit.

title: Marriage Story
description: Academy Award-nominated filmmaker Noah Baumbach's incisive and compassionate look at a marriage breaking up and a family staying together.

title: Midsommar
description: A couple travels to Scandinavia to visit a rural hometown's fabled midsummer festival, which turns into a pagan cult nightmare.

title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout
description: Ethan Hunt and his IMF team, along with some familiar allies, race against time after a mission goes wrong.

title: Mr. Bean's Holiday
description: Mr. Bean wins a trip to Cannes where he unwittingly separates a young boy from his father and must help them reunite.

title: Munna Bhai M.B.B.S.
description: A gangster sets out to fulfill his father's dream of him becoming a doctor, using his own unique style of healing.

title: My Name Is Khan
description: An Indian Muslim man with Asperger's syndrome embarks on a journey across America to speak to the President and clear his name.

title: Nobody
description: A bystander who intervenes to help a woman being harassed by a group of men becomes the target of a vengeful drug lord.

title: Orphan
description: A husband and wife who recently lost their baby adopt a 9-year-old girl, who is not nearly as innocent as she claims to be.

title: Pacific Rim
description: As a war between humankind and monstrous sea creatures rages on, a former pilot and a trainee are paired up to drive a legendary weapon.

title: Pathaan
description: An Indian secret agent races against a rogue mercenary leader who is planning a massive bio-weapon attack on India.

title: PK
description: An alien on Earth loses the only device he can use to communicate with his spaceship, forcing him to question religious dogmas.

title: Ride Along
description: Security guard Ben must prove to his girlfriend's top-cop brother James that he is good enough for her by joining a 24-hour patrol.

title: Saw
description: Two strangers awake in a room with no memory of how they got there, and soon discover they're pawns in a deadly game perpetrated by a notorious serial killer.

title: Singham
description: An honest small-town police officer clashes with a corrupt politician-turned-extortionist who challenges his authority.

title: Sinister
description: A washed-up true-crime writer finds a box of super 8 home movies in his new house that suggest the murder he is researching is the work of a serial killer.

title: Skyfall
description: James Bond's loyalty to M is tested when her past comes back to haunt her. When MI6 comes under attack, 007 must track down the threat.

title: Superbad
description: Two co-dependent high school seniors are forced to deal with separation anxiety after their plan to stage a booze-fueled party goes awry.

title: Taken
description: A retired CIA agent travels across Europe and relies on his old skills to save his estranged daughter who has been kidnapped.

title: Tamasha
description: An internal journey of a man who loses his true self by trying to conform to society's standards and conventions.

title: The Black Phone
description: After being abducted by a child killer and locked in a soundproof basement, a 13-year-old boy starts receiving calls on a disconnected phone from the killer's previous victims.

title: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button
description: Tells the story of Benjamin Button, a man who starts aging backwards with bizarre and emotional consequences.

title: The Dictator
description: The heroic story of a North African dictator who risks his life to ensure that democracy would never come to the country he so lovingly oppressed.

title: The Equalizer
description: A man who believes he has put his mysterious past behind him cannot stand idly by when he meets a young girl under the control of ultra-violent Russian gangsters.

title: The Notebook
description: An epic love story centered around an older man who reads aloud to a woman with Alzheimer's from a notebook.

title: The Nun
description: A priest with a haunted past and a novice on the threshold of her final vows are sent by the Vatican to investigate the death of a young nun in Romania.

title: The Prestige
description: After a tragic accident, two stage magicians in 1890s London engage in a battle to create the ultimate illusion while sacrificing everything they have.

title: The Raid: Redemption
description: An elite SWAT team becomes trapped in a high-rise building run by a ruthless drug lord and his army of killers and thugs.

title: The Social Network
description: As Harvard student Mark Zuckerberg creates the social networking site that would become known as Facebook, he is sued by the twins who claimed he stole their idea.

title: The Terminal
description: An Eastern European tourist finds himself stranded in JFK airport when a war erupts in his homeland, making his passport invalid.

title: The Wolf of Wall Street
description: Based on the true story of Jordan Belfort, from his rise to a wealthy stockbroker living the high life to his fall involving crime and corruption.

title: Tiger Zinda Hai
description: Tiger and Zoya join forces once again to rescue a group of nurses held hostage by a terrorist organization in Iraq.

title: Top Gun: Maverick
description: After thirty years, Maverick is still pushing the envelope as a top naval aviator, training a detachment of graduates for a dangerous special mission.

title: Transformers
description: An ancient struggle between two Cybertronian races, the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons, comes to Earth.

title: Troy
description: An adaptation of Homer's great epic, the film follows the assault on Troy by the united Greek forces.

title: War
description: An Indian soldier is assigned to eliminate his former mentor, who has gone rogue after multiple secret operations.

title: Yes Man
description: A man challenges himself to say 'yes' to absolutely everything for an entire year, changing his dull life completely.
